mapper.select: SELECT id, package_name, version, repository, jsonb_pretty(package_data) AS package_data, created_at FROM jsonb_packages WHERE package_type = 'apt' ORDER BY package_name
SELECT id, package_name, version, repository, jsonb_pretty(package_data) AS package_data, created_at FROM jsonb_packages WHERE package_type = 'yum' ORDER BY package_name

SELECT id, package_name, version, repository, package_type, jsonb_pretty(package_data) AS package_data, created_at FROM jsonb_packages WHERE package_data::text ILIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR package_name ILIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' ORDER BY package_name
SELECT id, package_name, version, repository, package_type, jsonb_pretty(package_data) AS package_data, created_at FROM jsonb_packages WHERE id = #{id}
